mano_cua.result_summary: Globe投影下含raster-dem+hillshade图层的地图永远无法loaded: setProjection({type:'globe'})后map.loaded()持续返回false，idle事件永不触发。控制台大量404错误(DEM瓦片加载失败)+requestAnimationFrame性能警告。地图状态机死锁。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: After setProjection to globe, map.loaded() persistently returns false and idle event never fires. 404 errors on DEM tile requests. Map state machine deadlock with raster-dem source in globe projection.
